tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or possible prediabetes. LDL and total cholesterol are also elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. Carbon dioxide is slightly low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control and lipid profile.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
